description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a deploy stage containing a pages job that runs only on the master branch. The pages job should execute the exact shell commands in order: mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, cp -r .well-known/ .public, mkdir .gzipped, cp -r * .gzipped, gzip -r .gzipped, cp -r .gzipped/* .public, mv .public public. It must publish the resulting public/ directory as an artifact and use the default Docker image for the runner.
